summary: Tested HeroSection.jsx against full March 2026 spec. All 20 spec requirements verified at both desktop (1920px) and mobile (390px).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hero section fully implemented and verified. All spec elements present: gold 3px top bar, eyebrow, two-line headline (white/gold), gold divider, body+connector sentence, proof strip (90/5/5), CTAs linking to /ground-0-briefing and /standards, right panel with risk card ($10K-$25K+ in coral), versus divider, solution card (LaunchPath Standard), WHAT THE STANDARD INSTALLS label, all 6 domain rows with monospace prefix. Mobile 390px: right col hidden, headline 28px.
